languages.text: "Запрос недопустим. Я опасался, что аугментирование жизнеформы "боец-пустотник" выше заданной нормы вызовет искажения в представлениях утилитарных жизнеформ о собственной ценности. Как и ожидалось, теперь они необоснованно ее завышают." {n}Шипение вокса {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} едва слышно за ропотом толпы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Запрос недопустим. Я опасался, что аугментирование жизнеформы "боец-пустотник" выше заданной нормы вызовет искажения в представлениях черни о собственной цености. Как и ожидалось, теперь они необоснованно ее завышают."{n}Шипение вокса {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} едва слышно за ропотом толпы.{/n}
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Запрос недопустим. Я опасался, что аугментирование жизнеформы "боец-пустотник" выше заданной нормы вызовет искажения в представлениях утилитарных жизнеформ о собственной ценности. Как и ожидалось, теперь они необоснованно ее завышают." {n}Шипение вокса {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} едва слышно за ропотом толпы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The request is unacceptable. I feared that augmenting the voidsman fighter life form above the established standard would cause distortions in the utility life forms' perception of their individual value. As I expected, their calculations are now inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

languages.text: 「要求は受け入れられない。空挺部隊の増強は、暴徒の個人の価値観を歪める可能性がある。予想通り、彼らの計算は膨らんでいる。」{n}ジェネーターのボイスが、暴徒のざわめきの中で聞こえるのはかすかなヒス音だけだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I feared that augmenting the void trooper unit above the established standard would cause distortions in the rabble's perception of their individual value. As I expected, their calculations are now inflated."{n}The hiss of the Genetor's vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「要求は受け入れられない。空挺部隊の増強は、暴徒の個人の価値観を歪める可能性がある。予想通り、彼らの計算は膨らんでいる。」{n}ジェネーターのボイスが、暴徒のざわめきの中で聞こえるのはかすかなヒス音だけだ。{/n}

languages.text: "Talep kabul edilemez. Uçsuz eri yaşam formuna belirlenen sınırın üzerinde ogment sağlamanın, hizmetkâr yaşam formlarının kendi bireysel değerlerine dair çarpık, yani mantıksızca şişirilmiş bir algı geliştirmesine neden olacağını öngörmüştüm." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör'ün{/g} voksundan çıkan tıslama, kalabalığın mırıltısı yüzünden zar zor duyulabiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Talep kabul edilemez. Uçsuz eri yaşam formuna belirlenen sınırın üzerinde ogment sağlamanın, hizmetkâr yaşam formlarının kendi bireysel değerlerine dair çarpık, yani mantıksızca şişirilmiş bir algı geliştirmesine neden olacağını öngörmüştüm." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör'ün{/g} voksundan çıkan tıslama, kalabalığın mırıltısı yüzünden zar zor duyulabiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: «La solicitud es inaceptable. Estimé que aumentar a la forma de vida soldado del vacío más allá de los parámetros establecidos llevaría a las formas de vida utilitarias a desarrollar una percepción distorsionada de su valor individual; es decir, una inflación irracional del mismo». {n}El siseo del voco del {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} es casi inaudible entre los murmullos de los presentes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La solicitud es inaceptable. Estimé que aumentar a la forma de vida soldado del vacío más allá de los parámetros establecidos llevaría a las formas de vida utilitarias a desarrollar una percepción distorsionada de su valor individual; es decir, una inflación irracional del mismo». {n}El siseo del voco del {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} es casi inaudible entre los murmullos de los presentes.{/n}

languages.text: “该请求不可接受。我预判到，将舰船士兵的生命体强化到既定基线以上，会导致这些工具性生命体对其个体价值产生扭曲的认知——即非理性的自我膨胀。”{n}那位{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}音阵发出的嘶嘶声，几乎被人群的窃窃私语淹没。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “该请求不可接受。我预判到，将舰船士兵的生命体强化到既定基线以上，会导致这些工具性生命体对其个体价值产生扭曲的认知——即非理性的自我膨胀。”{n}那位{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}音阵发出的嘶嘶声，几乎被人群的窃窃私语淹没。{/n}

languages.text: « Cette demande est inacceptable. J'avais prédit que l'augmentation du cosmomarin au-delà de la valeur de référence établie donnerait aux entités ouvrières une image disproportionnée de leur valeur individuelle. Irrationnellement élevée, même. » {n}La voix sifflante qui sort du vox du {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} se fait à peine entendre par-dessus les murmures de la foule.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Cette demande est inacceptable. J'avais prédit que l'augmentation du cosmomarin au-delà de la valeur de référence établie donnerait aux entités ouvrières une image disproportionnée de leur valeur individuelle. Irrationnellement élevée, même. {n}La voix sifflante qui sort du vox du {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} se fait à peine entendre par-dessus les murmures de la foule.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Anfrage ist inakzeptabel. Ich habe prognostiziert, dass jede weiterführende Augmentierung der Lebensform Raumfahrer-Soldat zu einer gestörten und irrational erhöhten Wahrnehmung des eigenen Wertes bei den unterstützenden Lebensformen führen würde." {n}Das Zischen des Vox des {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} ist angesichts des Raunens der Menge kaum zu hören.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}
